title: CityMod:Traffic and life
description: Use this mod to build realistic Chinese style city
body:
# overview
This is a Forge&Neoforge mod made by a Chinese high school student.
This mod adds blocks for cities, transportations and household appliances and a construction assistant and having strong Chinese city characteristics.
More content will be added in the future.
# Notes
This mod made by MCreator.If you don't like it,you can leave.
This mod support English and Chinese only.
1.20.1 and lower version wonn't be update in future(never!)
We support NeoForge 1.21.1 and Fabric 1.21.8 now!
# Added Blocks
- Road line blocks and a lot of road signs
- Road Direction signs
- Poles
- Trash bin
- Many kinds of modern fences
- Solar water heater
- Fire extinguisher box
- Gaming PC
- GPUs(look like aircondition)
- AirConditions
- Some high-res household appliances model(May cause lag on low performance devices,for example mobile phones and computers with low RAM or VRAM)
- Modern Windows

Waring:Mod conflict with Create 0.5.1f,and few of blocks missing model in version Fabric 1.21.8
